text: AI remote work tools (2023-2026): Zoom AI Companion (2024) generates meeting summaries, action items, and smart chapters. Microsoft Teams Copilot provides real-time transcription, translation, and intelligent recap. Slack AI (2024) surfaces relevant conversations, summarizes channels, and answers workspace questions. Notion AI serves as a team knowledge base with Q&A over all team documents.

AI productivity analytics (2024-2026): Microsoft Viva Insights and ActivTrak use ML to analyze work patterns -- meeting load, focus time, collaboration networks, and burnout risk indicators. Hybrid work optimization: AI recommends office days based on team co-location and meeting schedules. AI-powered asynchronous communication: Loom AI auto-generates video summaries and chapters, reducing meeting needs.
